description: The entity deploys control activities through policies that establish what is expected and in procedures that put policies into action.

subcriteria.name: policy_documentation
subcriteria.reference_text: Security policy document covering access control, data classification, incident response, change management, acceptable use, encryption, and vendor management. Policy approved by CISO or security leadership and version-controlled with review dates.

subcriteria.name: policy_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Policies reviewed and updated at least annually by the security team or policy owners. Review log shows last review date, reviewer name, and approval. Changes tracked and communicated to affected employees.

subcriteria.name: procedure_execution
subcriteria.reference_text: Written procedures for executing key controls including access provisioning, incident handling, change deployment, and vulnerability remediation. Responsible personnel identified and trained. Procedures regularly tested and updated.

mismatch_signals.reason: SIEM tools are technical controls, not policy documentation.
Business continuity infrastructure is not policy governance.
